reference: Hi! I recently recovered from a severe kidney infection, after which I started to develop hemorrhoids. Occasionally, I get a cut near my tailbone when my hemorrhoids bother me, and recently, I have noticed some bumps in that area. I developed these bumps after wearing a thong for a week, which I typically do not wear. I am unsure if they are due to the hemorrhoids, the rubbing from the thong, or if it could be something else.
